title: My Nether's Delight Fix
description: Fix incompatibility of My Nether's Delight 1.8 and Farmer's Delight 1.3+; also support Miners Delight+, Dungeons Delight
body:
Farmer's Delight introduced several breaking changes since version 1.3+, which can cause the latest 1.20.1 Forge version of My Nether's Delight to crash when blocks are placed above Nether Stoves. It also causes Miner's Delight to crash during startup.

Although My Nether's Delight has already received updates for newer 1.21+ NeoForge versions, this crash has remained unfixed on 1.20.1 Forge for several weeks at the moment. Miner's Delight of 1.20.1 has also not yet been patched either. This project provides an unofficial compatibility patch for that issue.

## What this patch does

This mod patches the crash related to Nether Stove block interactions caused by newer Farmer's Delight internals.

It is intended for modpacks or players who are using:

*   Minecraft 1.20.1
*   Forge
*   Farmer's Delight 1.3+ (Required)
*   My Nether's Delight 1.8 (Optional)
*   Miner's Delight 1.2.3 (Optional)
*   Dungeons Delight 1.2.10 (Optional, please use RunicLib 4.3.7 instead of 4.3.8)
*   Smidgeon o' Bliss REMASTERED 1.1.4.1
*   Compat Delight 1.0.1.1

## Important notes

This is an unofficial patch and is not affiliated with Farmer's Delight, My Nether's Delight, or other Farmer's Delight addons mentioned above.

Remove this patch if the original mods fix the issue in a future update, unless this mod page states otherwise.

## Credits

All credit for the original mods belongs to their respective authors.

## Support

If you'd like to support my modding work, including maintenance, updates, and compatibility work, Patreon is available here: [https://patreon.com/vomiter\_scp](https://patreon.com/vomiter_scp)
